{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Outer General
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Outer General]] is currently in the field.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
